acquisition method: Data-dependent tandem mass spectrometry (MS/MS) analyses were performed on Thermo Q-Exactive instrument
alkylation reagent: using a protein/enzyme ratio of 50:1 (w/w). Tryptic peptides were desalted with Pierce C18 spin column (GL Sciences) and separated in a proxeon EASY-nLC liquid chromatography system by applying a step-wise gradient of 0–85% acetonitrile (ACN) in 0.1% foricacid.
cleavage agent: using a protein/enzyme ratio of 50:1 (w/w). Tryptic peptides were desalted
collision energy: Normalized collision energy was set at 30%
ionization type: Peptides eluted from the liquid chromatography were directly electrosprayed into the mass spectrometer
